docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $812.50 FILED BY WALKER, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT SOTO, TONY DBA TNA STUDIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00);REMARKS:SERVICE WAS CANCELLED BY PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALKER, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT SOTO, TONY DBA TNA STUDIO
